channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-189] RHEL6 MMP patch misses fix from bug 22117
item.description: The RHEL6 MMP patch which was landed on master does not include the fix from bugzilla ticket 22117, commit bfbeeb667f2f3c8d1cbde7d2bf063cf1d6fb50bd.
item.summary: RHEL6 MMP patch misses fix from bug 22117

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-master » server,el6-i686 #20
LU-189 RHEL6 MMP patch misses fix from bug 22117

Oleg Drokin : 723b0fa656d41d29e0cdf45d8bd212d6f1d0e575
Files :

  • ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches/ext4-mmp-rhel6.patch
Fix landed to master. Please reopen if more work required.
